message:
style(indexer): collapse nested if in MemoCache::insert (uiojh clippy)

Single clippy collapsible-if warning that surfaced after the recent
ibuuh.34 content-addressed memoization slice (commit 549e10f5) landed
src/indexer/memoization.rs::MemoCache::insert. Combine the outer
`if !contains && len >= max` with the inner `if let Some(victim) =
pop_front()` using the stable let-chain syntax.

rch exec cargo clippy --all-targets --no-deps: 0 warnings after fix.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-uiojh scope item 7 (clippy
clean tree). The full uiojh bead remains open pending mot85's upstream
fsqlite writable_schema feature before the last two rusqlite test-fixture
sites can migrate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
